Figure 1 Urinary biomarker concentration in patients with and without acute kidney injury. Median and quartile deviations are shown.
Asterisk indicates statistically significant differences (P < 0.05) in medians between patients with and without acute kidney injury. A, serum
creatinine (sCr); B, urinary neutrophil gelatinase-associated lipocalin (NGAL); C, urinary NGAL corrected with urine creatinine (NGAL/Cr); D, blood
NGAL (bNGAL); E, urinary microalbumin (Alb); F, Alb corrected with urine creatinine (Alb/Cr); G, N-acetyl-β-D-glucosaminidase (NAG) H, urinary
liver fatty acid-binding protein (L-FABP) I, L-FABP corrected with urine creatinine (L-FABP/Cr).
